_comment: Mutation testing config. Run manually with: npx stryker run. Weekly via .github/workflows/mutation.yml.
_mutate_comment: We mutate test files because the helpers under test are inlined in pure-helpers.test.ts (jssg sandbox doesn't allow extracting helpers to a separate runtime-importable module). Most surviving mutants are test-name strings (low signal). Tracked as a baseline; not enforced as a CI block during pre-1.0. v0.7.6 baseline: 38.57% (108 killed / 278 mutants). See reports/mutation/mutation.html.
